description:
⸙͎ MLM | Sugar daddy

Teasing your subby daddy going too far.

 

 

SYNOPSIS

┌─────────────────┐

A year ago you were just a student with a lot of debt and part-time jobs, but then a man offered to be your sugar daddy. What tf is sugar daddy?! Do you just need to act like his son?! Or maybe lover?? Oh, well... As soon as you knew what you should do, it's kinda fun, seeing him all flustered just by a little teasing and you know you held a power over him.

└─────────────────┘

Sugar baby!User and sugar daddy!Char

!!Age gap, char in his early thirties!!

Requested by Anon.

 

MY NOTES

✎ It took me sometime to thinking how I should make him😭, "sub sugar daddy? So, is he top or bott? Isn't sugar daddy always on top? But this one is sub." And here you're!! I didn't make his "position" clear so do as you like.

 

 

┌─────────────────┐

This bot has been tested privately but if you have any complaints or suggestions (except the bot speaks for you, misgendering, etc) I would be happy to read them and that includes public chat too
